entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum cultivar CSH6 used in the study

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: Added nitrogen applied at levels of 0, 10, 25, 50, and 100 mg N kg–1 soil

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: Phosphorus element whose uptake was measured in the plant

entities.name: DRY MATTER PRODUCTION
entities.description: The accumulation of dry matter in the tops and roots of the plant

entities.name: NITROGEN UPTAKE
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen absorbed by the tops and roots of the plant

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS UPTAKE
entities.description: The amount of phosphorus absorbed by the tops and roots of the plant

entities.name: VERTISOL
entities.description: A type of soil used as a growth medium in the experiment

entities.name: ALFISOL
entities.description: A type of soil used as a growth medium in the experiment

entities.name: GREENHOUSE POT EXPERIMENT
entities.description: The experimental setup used to study the effects of nitrogen and phosphorus

entities.name: TOP DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: The dry weight of the upper parts of the sorghum plant

entities.name: ROOT WEIGHT
entities.description: The dry weight of the root system of the sorghum plant

entities.name: FIELD CAPACITY SOIL MOISTURE CONTENT
entities.description: The soil moisture level maintained during the experiment
